curated_sources.title: Health benefits of fermented foods: microbiota and beyond
curated_sources.relevance: Provides a comprehensive framework for how fermented foods interact with the human gut microbiome and the physiological mechanisms involved.

curated_sources.title: Fermented Foods: Dietary Choices and Human Health
curated_sources.relevance: Focuses on the epidemiological evidence linking fermented dairy and vegetable consumption to reduced risks of non-communicable diseases.

curated_sources.title: The Microbiota of Fermented Foods as a Source of Beneficial Microorganisms
curated_sources.relevance: Detailed analysis of the taxonomic diversity of microbes in global fermented products and their survival through the gastrointestinal tract.

curated_sources.title: Impact of a fermented food intervention on the gut microbiome and immune status
curated_sources.relevance: A landmark clinical trial showing that high-fermented-food diets increase microbiome diversity and decrease inflammatory markers.

curated_sources.title: Lactic acid bacteria in contemporary fermentation: Role in food safety and nutrition
curated_sources.relevance: Explores the biopreservative properties of LAB and their role in synthesizing bioactive metabolites like vitamins and exopolysaccharides.

curated_sources.title: Metagenomic analysis of the food-gut axis
curated_sources.relevance: Uses computational biology to track specific microbial strains from fermented foods as they colonize the human gut.

curated_sources.title: Chapter 4: Biochemistry of Fermentation
curated_sources.relevance: Technical breakdown of metabolic pathways (glycolysis, proteolysis, lipolysis) that transform raw substrates into fermented products.

curated_sources.title: Chapter 12: Probiotics and Prebiotics in Fermented Dairy
curated_sources.source_book: The Gut-Brain Axis: Dietary, Therapeutic and Therapeutic Perspectives
curated_sources.relevance: Discusses the specific interaction between fermented dairy metabolites and the enteric nervous system.

curated_sources.title: The intricate web of the human gut microbiome
curated_sources.relevance: General overview of microbiome stability, resilience, and the factors that influence community composition.

curated_sources.title: Microbial ecology in food systems
curated_sources.relevance: Examines how environmental factors during fermentation dictate the succession of microbial species.
